build.description: Lightweight router and decision maker. Prefers copilot-worker, escalates when needed.

copilot-worker.description: Default low-cost executor: high-volume simple features, refactors, tests, small bug fixes.

implementer.description: Precision, multi-file and complex changes. Used only when escalated or explicitly requested.

planner.description: Creates step plans for unclear or large tasks. Invoked by build when task needs structuring.

auditor.description: Post-execution review and validation. Runs after heavy execution or on demand.

minimax.description: Optional analysis helper; 100% manual. Not used by router unless explicitly requested.
